title: What To Expect From Petco's (WOOF) Q3 Earnings
text: Petco (WOOF) Q3 Earnings Expectations. Upcoming Results: Petco will report Q3 earnings this Tuesday afternoon. Revenue Forecast: Analysts expect revenue to decline 2.8% year-over-year to $1.47 billion, representing a reversal from the previous year's 1.2% growth in the same quarter. Earnings Estimate: Adjusted earnings per share are projected at $0.03. Recent Performance: Last quarter, the company met revenue expectations at $1.49 billion (down 2.3% YoY) while beating both EPS and EBITDA estimates. Track Record: Petco has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates five times over the last two years, indicating a pattern of underperformance relative to expectations. Stock Performance: The stock has declined 27.7% over the past month and currently trades at $2.76, below the average analyst price target of $3.81. Industry Context: Peer companies showed mixed results. National Vision achieved 7.9% revenue growth while Tractor Supply reported 7.2% growth, though both stocks moved differently post-earnings, suggesting unpredictable market reactions to consumer retail results.
